title: Money Guarantee
definition: Covers your money while in premises, in a locked safe, in hands of authorized employees, and while in transit to and from the bank. Who is this for? This is suitable for businesses with cash in transit risks.
benefits: This covers money while being moved from premises to bank and vice versa. The cover also extends to cover money within the premises in a safe and strong room. It also covers money in hands of senior staff and damage to the safe. In all cases, limits are provided and the estimated annual carry.
eligibility: Please contact Old Mutual Uganda for detailed eligibility and application requirements.
